CustomObject.description: Release-testing harness object. Selected for Change Data Capture (the standard ChangeEvents channel drives the Apex change-event trigger; the SubscriberCdcProbe__chn custom channel additionally exposes it to streaming subscribers) so inserting a record emits a SubscriberCdcProbe__ChangeEvent that the harness change-event trigger dispatches through kern.TRG_Dispatcher — exercising the subscriber-side CDC + DTO_ChangeEventHeader Flow contract end-to-end. Not part of the managed package; deployed unmanaged into the subscriber test org alongside the rest of the harness.
CustomObject.label: Subscriber CDC Probe
